news.title: Building a Legacy: Thompson Scholars Create Community for the Future
news.summary_en: When a group of Michigan Technological University seniors saw an opportunity to strengthen the Thompson Scholars experience, they seized it — creating a new registered student organization designed to build community. news.title: All In on AI: Michigan Tech Launches New Degree, Concentration and Minor
news.summary_en: Michigan Technological University will launch a new Bachelor of Science in Artificial Intelligence degree program this fall, making it one of a select group of institutions nationwide to offer a dedicated undergraduate program in the field.  Michigan Tech's new bachelor's  . . .
